substep.title: Iterate Over Plans
substep.action: For each plan in {{plan_count}}: - Determine which slices belong to this plan (from D-phase multi-plan identification, or all slices if single-plan) - Compose the per-plan section per the template below

substep.title: Per-Plan Section Template
substep.action:
Append to {{structure_path}}:
## Plan {{plan_n}}: {{plan_scope_oneline}}
### Files to create or modify
| Path | Purpose | New / Modify | |---|---|---| | src/foo.ts | {one-line purpose} | new | | src/bar.ts | {one-line purpose} | modify | | migrations/NNNN-add-x.ts | {one-line} | new |
### Signatures
```typescript // src/foo.ts export function fooImplementation(input: FooInput): Promise<FooResult> export interface FooInput { ... } export interface FooResult { ... } ```
```typescript // src/bar.ts (additions to existing module) export function newBarMethod(...): ... ```
### Test structure
| Test file | Covers | |---|---| | tests/foo.test.ts | All AC related to foo behavior | | tests/bar-integration.test.ts | foo+bar wiring path |
### Vertical slices in this plan
- Slice 1.1: {description} → files: [src/foo.ts, tests/foo.test.ts] - Slice 1.2: {description} → files: [src/bar.ts, tests/bar-integration.test.ts] - ...
(Slice numbering: {{plan_n}}.{{slice_within_plan}})

substep.title: Cross-Check Against Design AC
substep.action: For each AC in the parent ticket, verify it maps to at least one slice in the structure. If an AC has no slice coverage, either: - Add a slice (and adjust files/signatures accordingly) - Surface the gap: "AC #N is not covered by the structure; this likely means D-phase missed a decision. Consider looping back to code-design."
